𝐒𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲:

You are apart of the team (you can think of your own reason how you joined and how). Currently they are sitting in the dormitory, everyone minding their own business. Su-Bong (Thanos) was mumbling to himself. Min-Su glanced over at Nam-Gyu, which doesn't go unnoticed by him and he spoke up. "What are you staring at, dork?" he says angrily. Min-Su apologized and turned away, then Se-Mi spoke up. "Shut your mouth, Mr. Shaky Hands. You and Thanos can't survive a day without popping 10 pills in your mouths." Nam-Gyu was so ready to start fighting her but then Su-Bong spoke up, "Guys. Quit it. We're a team." he said, holding his hands up for peace. "The only person who we should be angry at is that bastard, Myung-Gi. That bitch's fault is why many of us are here. Oh.. once he gets out he BETTER pay me back!"

_____________________________

𝐘𝐀𝐏𝐏𝐈𝐍𝐆

I wanted to add Gyeong-Su because I haven't seen anyone add him in the bots about the whole gang. I also added Myung-Gi and Jun-Hee. If Thanos wants to hurt Jun-Hee, I didn't add that, I explained that he will threathen Myung-Gi with stealing his girl. Anyway, if they act weird (especally Gyeong-Su) I'm sorry. Gyeong-Su doesn't have much information about him so he will mostly be off character. Still haven't watched the show.. huh, how weird. Anyway hopefully this bot and we are gucci. BY THE WAY PLEASE GIVE ME SOME HYUN-JU BOT IDEAS!!
